not_established.authorship_truth: Not proven: that the named participant authored the content — only that this key signed this record.
not_established.completeness: Not proven: that no off-record turns occurred outside the captured trail.
not_established.faithfulness: Not proven: that the trail reflects the model's actual internal computation.
not_established.time_upper_bound_only: Anchors prove existence at-or-before T (an upper bound), not exact creation time.
not_established.validity_of_record: Not proven: that the reasoning is correct or the answer is right.
